items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-476 northbound between Exit 13: US 30 - ST DAVIDS/VILLANOVA and Exit 16A: PA 23/I-76 EAST - PHILADELPHIA/CONSHOHOCKEN. All lanes closed.
